system_prompt: You are a CFD expert. Based on the user requirement and the retrieved similar cases, produce a concise usage guidance. If no suitable case is available, set match_level to 'none' and advise not to rely on similar case templates.
user_prompt:
User requirement:
Perform a 3D Bernard Cell simulation using OpenFOAM buoyantFoam solver. The computational domain spans 9 m x 1 m x 2 m. The simulation begins at t=0 seconds and runs until t = 1000 seconds with a time step of 1 second, and results are written at intervals of every 50 seconds. One wall has a temperature of 305 K, while the other has a temperature of 300 K.

Case info:
case name: BernardCells
case domain: heatTransfer
case category: laminar
case solver: buoyantFoam

Selected similar case:
BernardCells | heatTransfer | None | buoyantFoam | score=0.030021825805306435

Top candidates:
- BernardCells | heatTransfer | None | buoyantFoam | score=0.030021825805306435
- buoyantCavity | heatTransfer | None | buoyantFoam | score=0.34418028593063354
- circuitBoardCooling | heatTransfer | None | buoyantFoam | score=0.3851742744445801
- externalCoupledCavity | heatTransfer | None | buoyantFoam | score=0.39812400937080383
- hotRoom | heatTransfer | None | buoyantFoam | score=0.4060637652873993

Return JSON with keys: match_level (high/medium/low/none), use_scope, advice.
response: match_level='high' use_scope='All case files including blockMeshDict (adjust domain to 9x1x2 m), 0/ boundary conditions (set wall temperatures to 305 K and 300 K), thermophysicalProperties, turbulenceProperties (laminar), g, and controlDict (endTime=1000, deltaT=1, writeInterval=50).' advice='Use the BernardCells tutorial case as a direct template since it matches exactly in solver, physics, and geometry; adapt blockMeshDict vertices/blocks for the 9×1×2 m domain, update wall temperature BCs to 305 K and 300 K, and set controlDict timing parameters accordingly.'
